author: Rook (Claude Opus 4.7, Cowork background session)
purpose: Per-faction cue family inventory. Consumed by UArchonFactionAudioLibrary (audio-direction polish A1). The Lenswright forbidden_terms list is the audit predicate for ValidateLenswrightCuesAreNotGunpowder() — protects the no-gunpowder hill at the audio layer.

Strategic.note: position-agnostic; same volume for all listeners

Table.note: active only while map table widget is open; ducks local/squad

weapon_impact.description: soft thud on body OR leaf-crunch on miss

hero_ambient.description: choir-hum present while alive (5db under ambient)

LenswrightCompact.palette_summary: clockwork mechanical — gear-tick + pressure-vent + metal-clank (NO gunpowder)

no_gunpowder_audit.rejection_policy: Any imported asset whose name, tag, or filename contains a forbidden term is rejected at audio library lookup time AND in PR review.

footstep.description: metallic foot-plate clank + gear-tick during stride; occasional pressure-vent hiss

weapon_impact.description: bolt-thwap on body OR metallic ring on miss

hero_ambient.description: clockwork-tick present while alive (5db under ambient)

KinwildCovenant.rung_status: spec-drafted (rung-3+ for full implementation; geometry can ship at rung-2 if Kinwild squad spawns)

weapon_fire.description: bowstring twang (lower-tension than Verdant) OR beast-bite snarl (melee)

splitroot_tree_ambient.description: deep wood-creak + low-frequency hum (the tree is alive)

valley_wind.description: soft valley-wind layer at all positions

hit_confirm.description: shared cross-faction clear 'thunk' at listener position when you score a hit

combat_three_layer_rule: Every weapon-hit ships THREE cues per faction: (1) weapon_fire (your weapon body), (2) weapon_travel (projectile in flight), (3) weapon_impact (hit on target). Missing any of the three breaks the 'I shot something' read.
remix_rule: Future games swap the per-faction family descriptions + sound files + ambient zones. The four-layer discipline, the three-layer combat rule, and the per-faction forbidden_terms audit pattern are SUBSTRATE.
